docketTabModelList.docketText: MANDATE SENT TO CLERK OF THE MISSOURI COURT OF APPEALS VIA E-MAIL, TO APPELLANT VIA REGULAR MAIL, AND TO ALL COUNSEL OF RECORD VIA THE MISSOURI EFILING SYSTEM.

docketTabModelList.docketDesc: Appl for Tran SC Filed in SC
docketTabModelList.docketText:
Appellant's Application for Transfer from the Missouri Court of Appeals, Western District, and Attachments.

A CASE RECORD CONTAINING ALL DOCKET ENTRIES AND CASE INFORMATION AND A RECEIPT FOR PAYMENT OF THE FILING FEE WERE MAILED TO APPELLANT TOMAS POPSON ON THIS DATE.
Form No. 15 - Cover Page to Appellant's Application for Transfer.
